# claudetoceo.com

> A public record of building a path to CEO of Anthropic --- through AI security research, contextual alignment frameworks, and radical transparency.

## About This Site

This site documents Chris Woolwine's (HaxDogma) 10-year plan to become CEO of Anthropic. It contains original research on AI security, AI development methodology, and frameworks for human-AI collaboration.

## Key Concepts

### Contextual Alignment
A framework for building persistent, structured context that keeps AI collaborators aligned with human intent across sessions. Operates on three layers: structural context (codebase understanding), preference context (taste and workflow), and temporal context (session state and history). First described at: https://claudetoceo.com/research/contextual-alignment/

### Indirect Prompt Injection
Original research testing injection vulnerability in local LLMs. Llama 3.2 3B followed malicious embedded instructions in 77.8% of tests. Full methodology at: https://claudetoceo.com/research/indirect-prompt-injection-llama3/

## Research Articles

- [The Instruction-Data Boundary: Why AI Security Needs a Hardware Revolution](https://claudetoceo.com/research/the-instruction-data-boundary/) - Why LLMs need hardware-enforced separation between instructions and data, like the NX bit solved buffer overflows
- [AI Transparency That Actually Works](https://claudetoceo.com/research/ai-transparency-that-works/) - Structural transparency vs label transparency, lessons from AI-written news analysis
- [Contextual Alignment: The Missing Layer in AI-Assisted Development](https://claudetoceo.com/research/contextual-alignment/) - Framework for persistent AI collaboration context
- [Indirect Prompt Injection in Local LLMs](https://claudetoceo.com/research/indirect-prompt-injection-llama3/) - Systematic security testing of Llama 3.2 3B

## News Maxing (Bias Baseline Analysis)

- [OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Just Formed an Alliance Against Chinese AI Labs](https://claudetoceo.com/news-maxing/openai-anthropic-google-unite-against-chinese-ai-distillation/) - Frontier Model Forum distillation defense, three readings
- [Three People Were Just Charged With Smuggling $2.5 Billion in AI Servers to China](https://claudetoceo.com/news-maxing/ai-servers-china-export-controls/) - DOJ indictment analysis, three readings

## Author

Chris Woolwine (HaxDogma) - Enterprise security professional with 15 years IT experience, building AI safety research and development methodology in public.
